## Meeting Purpose

[Explore collaboration opportunities between Marcel Santilli and Garrett Houghton in AI-driven content creation and education services.](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both have transitioned from corporate roles to successful AI-focused businesses (Marcel: growthax.ai, Garrett: AI education/content)](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel's agency model combines AI workflows, offshore talent, and high-margin services ($105k MRR, 70% margin)](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Garrett operates solo ($20k MRR) but is considering scaling options](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [Both see high demand and struggle to find qualified talent in the AI space](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Potential for collaboration on workshops, client training, and knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Personal Backgrounds and Business Journeys

  - [Marcel: Ex-IBM, HP; transitioned through startups (Hashi Corp, ServiceNow, DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Garrett: 10 years in corporate tech (Twitter, Buzzfeed); transitioned to AI consulting/education](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Both leveraged corporate experience to build AI-focused businesses](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel's journey: Content programs → offshore hiring → AI workflows → agency model](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Garrett's path: Management consulting → AI prototypes → education content for AI startups](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

### Current Business Models

  - [Marcel (growthax.ai):](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
    
      - [Agency model with "work streams" (e.g., content production, SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Utilizes AI workflows + offshore talent (7 full-time, multiple freelancers)](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [12 clients, $105k MRR, 70% margin](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [Clients include Reddit, Ramp, and other startups](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

  - [Garrett:](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
    
      - [Solo operation focusing on AI education content](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
      - [$20k MRR, considering scaling options](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [Writes for AI newsletters, creates education content for AI startups](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### AI Workflow and Tools

  - [Marcel uses AirOps for workflow prototyping and iteration](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Emphasis on decomposing tasks and optimizing prompts](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Garrett's process: recording audio, using ChatGPT, and polishing drafts](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Both stress the importance of human oversight and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

### Scaling Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Main bottleneck: Finding qualified talent in the AI space](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Marcel exploring options: continue scaling current model vs. raising funds for tech development](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Garrett considering how to scale beyond solo operation](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Potential for collaboration on workshops, training, and knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Business Philosophy and Goals

  - [Marcel: Build something meaningful, prioritize team growth, focus on job-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Garrett: Achieve freedom, creativity, and push personal limits](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Both value independence and creating impactful work](https://fathom.video/share/5c8MygZKCUBM9Wx8xsp8V7dsY4RhLvYa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Next Steps
